name: avatar
title: Avatar
description: A highly customizable neo-brutalist Avatar component built with Brutx design tokens for Vue 3.

files.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { AvatarRoot } from 'reka-ui'
import { type VariantProps } from 'class-variance-authority'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { avatarVariants } from '@/components/ui/avatar/avatar-variants'

type AvatarVariantProps = VariantProps<typeof avatarVariants>

interface AvatarProps {
    size?: NonNullable<AvatarVariantProps['size']>
    shape?: NonNullable<AvatarVariantProps['shape']>
    class?: string
}

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<AvatarProps>(), {
    size: 'default',
    shape: 'square',
    class: undefined,
})

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(avatarVariants({ size: props.size, shape: props.shape }), props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <AvatarRoot :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </AvatarRoot>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { AvatarFallback as AvatarFallbackPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

interface AvatarFallbackProps {
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<AvatarFallbackProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn('flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center bg-brutal-primary text-brutal-primary-foreground font-bold', props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <AvatarFallbackPrimitive :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </AvatarFallbackPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { AvatarImage as AvatarImagePrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

interface AvatarImageProps {
    src?: string
    alt?: string
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<AvatarImageProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn('aspect-square h-full w-full object-cover', props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <AvatarImagePrimitive v-if="src" :src="src" :alt="alt" :class="classes" />
</template>
